description: A seller has agreed to lower the price of their listed property. The agent needs to update the MLS and marketing materials.

nodes.task_description: Obtain written confirmation (e.g., price reduction addendum) from the seller for the new price.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives a signed document authorizing the price change.

nodes.task_description: Update the price in the MLS listing.

expected_outcome.value: The list price is successfully changed in the MLS system.

nodes.task_description: Notify all agents who have previously shown the property of the price reduction.

expected_outcome.value: A mass email is sent to all agents who have shown the property or saved the listing.
